title: gaya scopulorum
intro: Gaya scopulorum, also known as Gaya or Mountain Gaya, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It is primarily found in the Himalayan regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, with its extracts showing potential in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Gaya scopulorum, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its health benefits.
